EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITinAdvanced2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control advanced TIN functions.

[Guid("23FFD401-973F-11D5-8111-00C04FA0ADF8")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITinAdvanced2 : ITinAdvanced, ITin
